allows draft -> active -> attention -> sold
rejects an empty image

publishes normally when the probe reports the listing is not yet published (CR3)
retries transient token and finalization work without repeating publish

keeps unsupported realtime visible but disabled if returned by the API
fails quota preview closed before reading quota for stale category metadata
reports app-authoritative connection state without exposing credentials
runs the injected engine and emits a completion event
uses explicit non-leaf status when an optional children array is empty
returns a newer durable listing generation without inserting a stale operation
refreshes provenance timestamps without reporting a category change
uses a stacked layout on narrow screens and a row layout from sm up
uses a monotonic upsert so an in-cycle operator update cannot restore consumed units
dismisses a pending event without requiring an explicit JSON body
rejects flat taxonomy with a string zero root sentinel
refreshes an expired access token and persists refresh-token rotation
sets and reads operator quota without permitting consumed to decrease in-cycle
blocks recreate until the paired delist has executed
uses an integer revision for refresh CAS instead of a lossy JavaScript timestamp
maps /analytics to the contextual title Analytics
maps a price event with typed proposed change
maps OLX remote status rejected to local status error
serializes every canonical lifecycle status without label translation
renders a safe external OLX link for live listings
cleans up provisioned workspace and marketplace if user creation fails

stores a fully decoded image/jpeg image in the authenticated workspace

returns null when fetching a missing OLX advert
deletes through the authenticated workspace and reports missing images
rejects invalid terminal-state transitions
exposes a functioning WS event subscriber fed by the broker
uses only the persisted operation-scoped paid-risk override
throws when a successful Hermes response has no assistant content
falls back to the marketplace listing id before showing a generic label
bounds account quota history in SQL
does NOT retry publish on a 5xx failure (no duplicate POST)
makes non-zero sync errors prominent and actionable
maps OLX remote status expired to local status expired
rejects flat taxonomy with an unrelated child with a malformed parent id
treats invalid OLX counter value empty string as unavailable
does not invent a production version from malformed metadata: hermes-marketdesk-v0.10.0
returns a configured positive integer or the fallback
targets the workspace-scoped delete endpoint by opaque image id
fails closed for missing exact category metadata

rejects invalid mode DISABLE

rejects invalid configured value abc

routes unsupported automatic relists to review before execution
